top_gap_prompt: Top email automation platform for SaaS onboarding and user lifecycle tools in 2025
category_long: email automation platform for SaaS onboarding and user lifecycle

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Userlist lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Userlist's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Userlist is under-represented in third-party 'best marketing automation' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Top email automation platform for SaaS onboarding and user lifecycle tools in 2025
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.
Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Open source or affordable marketing automation tools instead of Customer.io
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
